heading: Seamless Cloud Transitions.
Zero Downtime Data Migration.
hero.subheading: Move your legacy databases and files securely to the cloud. Our enterprise-grade Data Migration tool guarantees data integrity, rapid transfer speeds, and minimal disruption.

pipeline.heading: Risk-Free Data Migration in 3 Phases.
pipeline.subheading: From initial audit to final validation, we ensure every byte makes it safely to its new home.

steps.title: Infrastructure Audit
steps.desc: Map out your existing legacy data schemas, dependencies, and business rules to create a foolproof transition plan.

steps.title: Schema Mapping
steps.desc: Translate old data types and structures into the optimized formats required by your new target destination.

steps.title: Continuous Sync & Transfer
steps.desc: Utilize change data capture (CDC) to move bulk data while keeping the old and new systems perfectly synchronized.

steps.title: Data Integrity Validation
steps.desc: Run automated hash-checks and row-count validations to prove 100% data accuracy.

steps.title: Zero-Downtime Cutover
steps.desc: Seamlessly reroute your application traffic to the new database with less than a second of downtime.

features.heading: Why Choose Our Migration Tool
features.subheading: We've removed the stress, data loss, and endless weekends associated with legacy migrations.

items.title: Zero Downtime, Zero Disruptions.
items.description: Our Change Data Capture (CDC) technology syncs data in real-time, meaning your business never goes offline while data moves in the background.

items.title: Automated Schema Translation.
items.description: Moving from Oracle to Postgres? Or SQL to NoSQL? Our engine automatically converts schema types and handles data transformations on the fly.

items.title: End-to-End Encryption.
items.description: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest using AES-256 and TLS 1.3. Security is guaranteed throughout the entire transition pipeline.

items.title: Guaranteed Data Fidelity
items.description: We don't just move data; we prove it arrived safely. Comprehensive auditing and validation scripts verify every single row.

faq.heading: Common Migration Questions.
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know before moving your critical data.

items.question: Do we need to take our application offline?
items.answer: No. Our Change Data Capture (CDC) ensures the source database remains live. When the transfer is complete, we perform a sub-second cutover.

items.question: What happens if the migration is interrupted?
items.answer: The tool uses checkpointing. If the network drops or a server reboots, the migration resumes exactly where it left off without duplicating data.

items.question: Which databases do you support?
items.answer: We support all major relational databases (Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, Postgres), NoSQL stores (MongoDB, Cassandra), and modern cloud warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift).

items.question: How do you guarantee data accuracy?
items.answer: Phase 3 includes automated validation. We perform row-by-row hash checks to ensure the destination data is a perfect, bit-for-bit match with the source.

items.question: Can you handle schema transformations?
items.answer: Yes. Our engine can rename columns, convert data types, and restructure tables during transit, allowing you to modernize your schema as you migrate.

cta.heading: Stop delaying your cloud transition.
cta.subheading: Move your data securely and finally shut down that expensive on-premise hardware.

useCases.heading: Migration Success Stories
useCases.subheading: See how enterprises modernized their stacks without skipping a beat.

items.title: Global Bank Escapes Legacy Hardware
items.description: Moved 50TB of financial records from an on-premise mainframe to Snowflake over a single weekend with zero downtime or customer impact.

items.title: Retailer Consolidates 14 Databases
items.description: Merged data from 14 regional MySQL instances into a single global Postgres cluster, normalizing schemas on the fly.

items.title: Healthcare Provider Migrates to the Cloud
items.description: Successfully migrated 10 years of patient records to AWS while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance and full end-to-end encryption.

product.heading: Why Traditional Migrations Fail
product.subheading: Manual data transitions are fraught with risks, hidden costs, and painful downtime.

items.title: Unacceptable Business Downtime
items.description: Legacy methods require taking applications offline for hours or days, costing thousands in lost revenue.

items.title: Silent Data Corruption
items.description: Moving millions of rows manually often results in dropped characters, wrong date formats, and corrupted files.

items.title: Runaway Consulting Costs
items.description: Hiring armies of consultants to write custom ETL scripts is expensive, slow, and hard to maintain.
